```powershell
# Import the necessary assembly
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms

# Create a new Form
$form = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.Form
$form.Text = "abc"
$form.StartPosition = [System.Windows.Forms.FormStartPosition]::.CenterScreen  # Center the form on the screen
$form.AutoSize = $true  # Make the form automatically adjust size to fit its contents
$form.FormBorderStyle = 'Sizable'  # Allow resizing the form

# Show the form
$form.ShowDialog()
```

- Imports the necessary Windows Forms assembly.

- Centers the form on the screen.
